english translation text: Munajat Shabaniyah

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

arabic text: وَٱسْمَعْ دُعَائِي إِذَا دَعَوْتُكَ
english translation text: You listen to my supplication whenever I pray to you,

arabic text: وَٱسْمَعْ نِدَائِي إِذَا نَادَيْتُكَ
english translation text: listen to my call whenever I call upon you,

arabic text: وَأَقْبِلْ عَلَيَّ إِذَا نَاجَيْتُكَ
english translation text: and accept from me whenever I make my submission to you in confidence,

arabic text: فَقَدْ هَرَبْتُ إِلَيْكَ
english translation text: I have escaped towards you and stood before you,

arabic text: وَوَقَفْتُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ مُسْتَكِيناً لَكَ
english translation text: standing before You, showing submission to You,

arabic text: مُتَضَرِّعاً إِلَيْكَ
english translation text: imploring You,

arabic text: رَاجِياً لِمَا لَدَيْكَ ثَوَابِي
english translation text: and hoping for the reward that You have for me.

arabic text: وَتَعْلَمُ مَا فِي نَفْسِي
english translation text: You know what is in my inner self,

arabic text: وَتَخْبُرُ حَاجَتِي
english translation text: and you are aware of my needs,

arabic text: وَتَعْرِفُ ضَمِيرِي
english translation text: and You know what is in my conscience,

arabic text: وَلاَ يَخْفَىٰ عَلَيْكَ أَمْرُ مُنْقَلَبِي وَمَثْوَايَ
english translation text: and all my moves and stillness are known by You.

arabic text: وَمَا أُرِيدُ أَنْ أُبْدِئَ بِهِ مِنْ مَنْطِقِي
english translation text: So are all the utterances which I want to begin with,

arabic text: وَأَتَفَوَّهَ بِهِ مِنْ طَلِبَتِي
english translation text: all the requests that I want to express,

arabic text: وَأَرْجُوهُ لِعَاقِبَتِي
english translation text: and all the expectation that I hope for my future.

arabic text: وَقَدْ جَرَتْ مَقَادِيرُكَ عَلَيَّ يَا سَيِّدِي
english translation text: O my Master, all Your decsions in relation to me have come to pass

arabic text: فِيمَا يَكُونُ مِنِّي إِلَىٰ آخِرِ عُمْرِي
english translation text: in all that happens to me up to the end of my life,

arabic text: مِنْ سَرِيرَتِي وَعَلانِيَتِي
english translation text: including my secret and open matters, shall be experienced by me.

arabic text: وَبِيَدِكَ لاَ بِيَدِ غَيْرِكَ زِيَادَتِي وَنَقْصِي
english translation text: And it is in Your hands, not anybody else’s, that are all my gains and losses

arabic text: وَنَفْعِي وَضَرِّي
english translation text: and all the benefits and harms that come upon me.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِنْ حَرَمْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَرْزُقُنِي
english translation text: My Lord, if You deprive me (of Your sustenance), then who else can ever provide me with sustenance?

arabic text: وَإِنْ خَذَلْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَنْصُرُنِي
english translation text: If You forsake me, then who else will help me?

arabic text: إِلٰهِي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَضَبِكَ وَحُلُولِ سَخَطِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, I do seek Your protection against Your wrath and earning your displeasure.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كُنْتُ غَيْرَ مُسْتَأْهِلٍ لِرَحْمَتِكَ
english translation text: O my Lord, if I am not deserving of Your mercy,

arabic text: فَأَنْتَ أَهْلٌ أَنْ تَجُودَ عَلَيَّ بِفَضْلِ سَعَتِكَ
english translation text: You are certainly fit to be generous to me by virtue of your magnanimity.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي كَأَنِّي بِنَفْسِي وَاقِفَةٌ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ
english translation text: My Lord, its like I see myself standing before You

arabic text: وَقَدْ أَظَلَّهَا حُسْنُ تَوَكُّلِي عَلَيْكَ
english translation text: It has been shaded by the goodness of my trust in you,

arabic text: فَقُلْتَ مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ وَتَغَمَّدْتَنِي بِعَفْوِكَ
english translation text: You said what befitted You and sheltered me with your forgiveness.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِنْ عَفَوْتَ فَمَنْ أَوْلَىٰ مِنْكَ بِذٰلِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, if you pardon me, then who else is worthier than You are in pardoning.

arabic text: وَإِنْ كَانَ قَدْ دَنَا أَجَلِي وَلَمْ يُدْنِنِي مِنْكَ عَمَلِي
english translation text: If my time of death is near and my deeds have not brought me close to You

arabic text: فَقَدْ جَعَلْتُ ٱلإِقْرَارَ بِٱلذَّنْبِ إِلَيْكَ وَسِيلَتِي
english translation text: I make this confession of my sins to be a means of approaching You.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي قَدْ جُرْتُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي فِي ٱلنَّظَرِ لَهَا
english translation text: My Lord, I have been unjust to my soul for I have not looked after it;

arabic text: فَلَهَا ٱلْوَيْلُ إِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لَهَا
english translation text: It will be doomed if You do not forgive me.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي لَمْ يَزَلْ بِرُّكَ عَلَيَّ أَيَّامَ حَيَاتِي
english translation text: My Lord, You have never ceased Your favors from me all my lifetime;

arabic text: فَلاَ تَقْطَعْ بِرَّكَ عَنِّي فِي مَمَاتِي
english translation text: So do not cease Your goodness towards me at the time of my death.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي كَيفَ آيَسُ مِنْ حُسْنِ نَظَرِكَ لِي بَعْدَ مَمَاتِي
english translation text: My Lord, how can I despair of Your benevolent attention towards me after my death

arabic text: وَأَنْتَ لَمْ تُوَلِّنِي إِلاَّ ٱلْجَمِيلَ فِي حَيَاتِي
english translation text: while You have always been good to me throughout my lifetime?

arabic text: إِلٰهِي تَوَلَّ مِنْ أَمْرِي مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
english translation text: My Lord, (please) manage my affairs in the very way that befits You,

arabic text: وَعُدْ عَلَيَّ بِفَضْلِكَ عَلَىٰ مُذْنِبٍ قَدْ غَمَرَهُ جَهْلُهُ
english translation text: and confer upon me—a sinful person who is covered by his ignorance—with Your favors.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي قَدْ سَتَرْتَ عَلَيَّ ذُنُوباً فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا
english translation text: My Lord, You have concealed my sins in this world,

arabic text: وَأَنَا أَحْوَجُ إِلَىٰ سَتْرِهَا عَلَيَّ مِنْكَ فِي ٱلأُخْرَىٰ
english translation text: but I am in greater need of their being concealed in the Next Life.

arabic text: إِذْ لَمْ تُظْهِرْهَا لِأَحَدٍ مِنْ عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
english translation text: You have not revealed my sins even before any of Your righteous servants;

arabic text: فَلاَ تَفْضَحْنِي يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ عَلَىٰ رُؤُوسِ ٱلْأَشْهَادِ
english translation text: therefore, (please) do not humuliate me on the Resurrection Day before all the witnesses.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي جُودُكَ بَسَطَ أَمَلِي
english translation text: My Lord, it is Your magnanimity that expanded my hope,

arabic text: وَعَفْوُكَ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ عَمَلِي
english translation text: and surely Your pardon is superior to my deeds.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي فَسُرَّنِي بِلِقَائِكَ يَوْمَ تَقْضِي فِيهِ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, therefore gladden my heart when I meet You on the day when You shall judge between Your servants.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي ٱعْتِذَارِي إِلَيْكَ ٱعْتِذَارُ مَنْ لَمْ يَسْتَغْنِ عَنْ قَبُولِ عُذْرِهِ
english translation text: My Lord, I submit to You the apology of one who cannot dispense with the acceptance of his excuse;

arabic text: فَٱقْبَلْ عُذْرِي يَا أَكْرَمَ مَنِ ٱعْتَذَرَ إِلَيْهِ ٱلْمُسِيئُونَ
english translation text: so, (please) accept my excuse, O most Magnanimous of all those before whom the guilty make an apology.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي لاَ تَرُدَّ حَاجَتِي
english translation text: My Lord, (please) do not reject my request,

arabic text: وَلاَ تُخَيِّبْ طَمَعِي
english translation text: do not dissapoint my hope for You,

arabic text: وَلاَ تَقْطَعْ مِنْكَ رَجَائِي وَأَمَلِي
english translation text: and do not cut off from You my hope and expectations from You.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي لَوْ أَرَدْتَ هَوَانِي لَمْ تَهْدِنِي
english translation text: My Lord, had You wanted to humiliate me, You would not have guided me (to You).

arabic text: وَلَوْ أَرَدْتَ فَضِيحَتِي لَمْ تُعَافِنِي
english translation text: Had You decided to humiliate me,You would not have excused me.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي مَا أَظُنُّكَ تَرُدُّنِي فِي حَاجَةٍ قَدْ أَفْنَيْتُ عُمْرِي فِي طَلَبِهَا مِنْكَ
english translation text: My Lord, I do not expect You to reject my request that I spent my whole lifetime asking for it from You.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي فَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ أَبَداً أَبَداً دَائِماً سَرْمَداً
english translation text: My Lord, all praise be to You, forever, forever, perpetually, everlastingly,

arabic text: يَزِيدُ وَلاَ يَبِيدُ كَمَا تُحِبُّ وَتَرْضَىٰ
english translation text: increasingly, and imperishably, as exactly as You like and please.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِنْ أَخَذْتَنِي بِجُرْمِي أَخَذْتُكَ بِعَفْوِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, if You punish me for my offense, I shall cling to Your pardon,

arabic text: وَإِنْ أَخَذْتَنِي بِذُنُوبِي أَخَذْتُكَ بِمَغْفِرَتِكَ
english translation text: if You cease me for my sins, I shall take hold of Your forgiveness,

arabic text: وَإِنْ أَدْخَلْتَنِي ٱلنَّارَ أَعْلَمْتُ أَهْلَهَا أَنِّي أُحِبُّكَ
english translation text: and if You put me to the fire, I shall declare to its inmates that I love You.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كَانَ صَغُرَ فِي جَنْبِ طَاعَتِكَ عَمَلِي
english translation text: My Lord, should my deeds be insignificant with respect to obedience to You,

arabic text: فَقَدْ كَبُرَ فِي جَنْبِ رَجَائِكَ أَمَلِي
english translation text: Great indeed is my hope with respect to my expectations from You.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي كَيْفَ أَنْقَلِبُ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ بِٱلْخَيْبَةِ مَحْرُوماً
english translation text: My Lord, how can it be that I return from You with disappointment and deprivation

arabic text: وَقَدْ كَانَ حُسْنُ ظَنِّي بِجُودِكَ أَنْ تَقْلِبَنِي بِٱلنَّجَاةِ مَرْحُوماً
english translation text: for indeed my beautiful opinion about Your generosity was that You shall reverse my fate by savng me mercifully.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي وَقَدْ أَفْنَيْتُ عُمْرِي فِي شِرَّةِ ٱلسَّهْوِ عَنْكَ
english translation text: My Lord, I have spent my entire lifetime in being negligent to You

arabic text: وَأَبْلَيْتُ شَبَابِي فِي سَكْرَةِ ٱلتَّبَاعُدِ مِنْكَ
english translation text: and I have spent my whole youth with the stupor of being distant from You.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي فَلَمْ أَسْتَيْقِظْ أَيَّامَ ٱغْتِرَارِي بِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, I did not wake up from my delusions

arabic text: وَرُكُونِي إِلَىٰ سَبِيلِ سَخَطِكَ
english translation text: and did not desist from pursuing the path of Your displeasure.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَٱبْنُ عَبْدِكَ قَائِمٌ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ
english translation text: My Lord, nevertheless, I am—Your servant and the son of Your servant,now standing before You

arabic text: مُتَوَسِّلٌ بِكَرَمِكَ إِلَيْكَ
english translation text: and begging You in the name of Your generosity.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي أَنَا عَبْدٌ أَتَنَصَّلُ إِلَيْكَ مِمَّا كُنْتُ أُوَاجِهُكَ بِهِ
english translation text: My Lord, I am a servant, disavowing before You

arabic text: مِنْ قِلَّةِ ٱسْتِحْيَائِي مِنْ نَظَرِكَ
english translation text: of my past attitude of lack of shame in Your sight

arabic text: وَأَطْلُبُ ٱلْعَفْوَ مِنْكَ إِذ ِٱلْعَفْوُ نَعْتٌ لِكَرَمِكَ
english translation text: seek Your pardon as it is the attribute of Your magnanimty to pardon;

arabic text: إِلٰهِي لَمْ يَكُنْ لِي حَوْلٌ فَأَنْتَقِلَ بِهِ عَنْ مَعْصِيَتِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, I had no strength to desist from Your disobedience

arabic text: إِلاَّ فِي وَقْتٍ أَيْقَظْتَنِي لِمَحَبَّتِكَ
english translation text: except when You awakened me for Your love

arabic text: وَكَمَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ أَكُونَ كُنْتُ
english translation text: Hence, I desired, that I become exactly as You want me to be.

arabic text: فَشَكَرْتُكَ بِإِدْخَالِي فِي كَرَمِكَ
english translation text: I have thus thanked You, for You admitting me into Your generosity

arabic text: وَلِتَطْهِيرِ قَلْبِي مِنْ أَوْسَاخِ ٱلْغَفْلَةِ عَنْكَ
english translation text: and You have purified my heart from the filth of being inattentive to You.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي ٱنْظُرْ إِلَيَّ نَظَرَ مَنْ نَادَيْتَهُ فَأَجَابَكَ
english translation text: My Lord, (please) look upon me in the same way as You have looked at one whom You called and he has responded to You

arabic text: وَٱسْتَعْمَلْتَهُ بِمَعُونَتِكَ فَأَطَاعَكَ
english translation text: and whom You used him in Your service with Your aid and so he obeys You.

arabic text: يَا قَرِيباً لاَ يَبْعُدُ عَنِ ٱلْمُغْتَرِّ بِهِ
english translation text: O the Near one who is not far away from those who love Him ardently

arabic text: وَيَا جَوَاداً لاَ يَبْخَلُ عَمَّنْ رَجَا ثَوَابَهُ
english translation text: O He Who is too magnanimous to deprive one who hopes for His reward!

arabic text: إِلٰهِي هَبْ لِي قَلْباً يُدْنِيهِ مِنْكَ شَوْقُهُ
english translation text: My Lord, (please) grant me a heart whose longing for You will draw one close to You,

arabic text: وَلِسَاناً يُرْفَعُ إِلَيْكَ صِدْقُهُ
english translation text: a tongue whose truthfulness ascends towards You,

arabic text: وَنَظَراً يُقَرِّبُهُ مِنْكَ حَقُّهُ
english translation text: and a sight whose trueness brings it close to You.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِنَّ مَنْ تَعَرَّفَ بِكَ غَيْرُ مَجْهُولٍ
english translation text: My Lord, certainly he who recognizes You shall never be anonymous,

arabic text: وَمَنْ لاَذَ بِكَ غَيْرُ مَخْذُولٍ
english translation text: he who seeks Your shelter shall never be disappointed,

arabic text: وَمَنْ أَقْبَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ غَيْرُ مَمْلُولٍ
english translation text: and he to whom You turn to does not fall victim to servility(dejection).

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِنَّ مَنِ ٱنْتَهَجَ بِكَ لَمُسْتَنِيرٌ
english translation text: My Lord, certainly he who abides by Your Path shall be enlightened,

arabic text: وَإِنَّ مَنِ ٱعْتَصَمَ بِكَ لَمُسْتَجِيرٌ
english translation text: and he who resorts in You finds refuge.

arabic text: وَقَدْ لُذْتُ بِكَ يَا إِلٰهِي فَلاَ تُخَيِّبْ ظَنِّي مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ
english translation text: Indeed certainly I have taken shelter in You, My Lord! So, (please) do not let down my opinion in Your mercy

arabic text: وَلاَ تَحْجُبْنِي عَنْ رَأْفَتِكَ
english translation text: and do not exclude me from Your compassion.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي أَقِمْنِي فِي أَهْلِ وِلايَتِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, place me, among those who show servitude to You,

arabic text: مُقَامَ مَنْ رَجَا ٱلزِّيَادَةَ مِنْ مَحَبَّتِكَ
english translation text: the position of those who (incessantly) hope to increase Your love.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي وَأَلْهِمْنِي وَلَهاً بِذِكْرِكَ إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, (please) inspire me with a mounting passion for Your rememberance,

arabic text: وَهِمَّتِي فِي رَوْحِ نَجَاحِ أَسْمَائِكَ وَمَحَلِّ قُدْسِكَ
english translation text: and (please) with an ardour for the refreshing resort to Your names and the station of Your Holiness.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي بِكَ عَلَيْكَ إِلاَّ أَلْحَقْتَنِي بِمَحَلِّ أَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, I beseech You in Your name to put me in the abode of those who are obedient to You

arabic text: وَٱلْمَثْوَىٰ ٱلصَّالِحِ مِنْ مَرْضَاتِكَ
english translation text: and to the righteous sanctuary of Your good pleasure,

arabic text: فَإِنِّي لاَ أَقْدِرُ لِنَفْسِي دَفْعاً
english translation text: for I,certainly I have no power to repel any harm

arabic text: وَلاَ أَمْلِكُ لَهَا نَفْعاً
english translation text: nor to obtain any benefit for it.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي أَنَا عَبْدُكَ ٱلضَّعِيفُ ٱلْمُذْنِبُ
english translation text: My Lord, I am Your weak and sinful servant—

arabic text: وَمَمْلُوكُكَ ٱلْمُنِيبُ
english translation text: and Your repenting slave.

arabic text: فَلاَ تَجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ صَرَفْتَ عَنْهُ وَجْهَكَ
english translation text: So, (please) do not include me amongst those from whom You have turned away Your face

arabic text: وَحَجَبَهُ سَهْوُهُ عَنْ عَفْوِكَ
english translation text: and those who are excluded from Your pardon because of their lapses.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي هَبْ لي كَمَالَ ٱلاِنْقِطَاعِ إِلَيْكَ
english translation text: My Lord, (please) grant me absolute devotion to You

arabic text: وَأَنِرْ أَبْصَارَ قُلُوبِنَا بِضِيَاءِ نَظَرِهَا إِلَيْكَ
english translation text: and illumine the vision of our hearts by the light of their gaze looking towards You

arabic text: حَتَّىٰ تَخْرِقَ أَبْصَارُ ٱلْقُلُوبِ حُجُبَ ٱلنُّورِ
english translation text: until the vision of our hearts pierces the curtains of light

arabic text: فَتَصِلَ إِلَىٰ مَعْدِنِ ٱلْعَظَمَةِ
english translation text: to reach the core of supremacy,

arabic text: وَتَصِيرَ أَرْوَاحُنَا مُعَلَّقَةً بِعِزِّ قُدْسِكَ
english translation text: and that our souls become suspended by the majesty of Your Holiness.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي وَٱجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ نَادَيْتَهُ فَأَجَابَكَ
english translation text: My Lord, (please) appoint me of those who responded to You when You called them,

arabic text: وَلاحَظْتَهُ فَصَعِقَ لِجَلالِكَ
english translation text: and at whom You glanced so he swoons before Your Majesty

arabic text: فَنَاجَيْتَهُ سِرّاً وَعَمِلَ لَكَ جَهْراً
english translation text: So You speak to him secretly and he works for You openly.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي لَمْ أُسَلِّطْ عَلَىٰ حُسْنِ ظَنِّي قُنُوطَ ٱلأَيَاسِ
english translation text: My Lord, do not let the dejection of despair overshadow my beautiful opinion

arabic text: وَلاَ ٱنْقَطَعَ رَجَائِي مِنْ جَمِيلِ كَرَمِكَ
english translation text: and do not cut my hope from Your generosity

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كَانَتِ ٱلْخَطَايَا قَدْ أَسْقَطَتْنِي لَدَيْكَ
english translation text: My Lord, if my lapses have made me to fall from Your grace,

arabic text: فَٱصْفَحْ عَنِّي بِحُسْنِ تَوَكُّلِي عَلَيْكَ
english translation text: So please pardon me for the beauty of my reliance upon You.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِنْ حَطَّتْنِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبُ مِنْ مَكَارِمِ لُطْفِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, if my wrongdoings have excluded me from the generosity of Your grace,

arabic text: فَقَدْ نَبَّهَنِي ٱلْيَقِينُ إِلَىٰ كَرَمِ عَطْفِكَ
english translation text: So certainly my conviction reassures me of Your generosity and gentleness.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِنْ أَنَامَتْنِيَ ٱلْغَفْلَةُ عَنِ ٱلإِسْتِعْدَادِ لِلِقَائِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, if my neglect has lulled me into slumber preventing me from preparing myself for my meeting with You,

arabic text: فَقَدْ نَبَّهَتْنِي ٱلْمَعْرِفَةُ بِكَرَمِ آلاَئِكَ
english translation text: So certainly my recognition apprises me of your generous bounties has awakened me.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي إِنْ دَعَانِي إِلَىٰ ٱلنَّارِ عَظِيمُ عِقَابِكَ
english translation text: My Lord, if Your grave chastisement calls me to the Hellfire,

arabic text: فَقَدْ دَعَانِي إِلَىٰ ٱلْجَنَّةِ جَزِيلُ ثَوَابِكَ
english translation text: So Your plentious reward has called me to Paradise.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي فَلَكَ أَسْأَلُ وَإِلَيْكَ أَبْتَهِلُ وَأَرْغَبُ
english translation text: My Lord, so to You I beg and I implore and I request.

arabic text: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: I beseech You to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

arabic text: وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَنِي مِمَّنْ يُدِيمُ ذِكْرَكَ
english translation text: and to include me with those who always remember You,

arabic text: وَلاَ يَنْقُضُ عَهْدَكَ
english translation text: and those who never break their promise to You,

arabic text: وَلاَ يَغْفُلُ عَنْ شُكْرِكَ
english translation text: and who do not neglect to thank You,

arabic text: وَلاَ يَسْتَخِفُّ بِأَمْرِكَ
english translation text: and who never belittle Your commands.

arabic text: إِلٰهِي وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِنُورِ عِزِّكَ ٱلأَبْهَجِ
english translation text: My Lord, (please do) submerge me in the most blissful lights of Your majesty,

arabic text: فَأَكُونَ لَكَ عَارِفاً
english translation text: so that I will recognize You

arabic text: وَعَنْ سِوَاكَ مُنْحَرِفاً
english translation text: and renounce all else except You,

arabic text: وَمِنْكَ خَائِفاً مُرَاقِباً
english translation text: and that I will be fearful of and careful with You.

arabic text: يَا ذَا ٱلْجَلاَلِ وَٱلإِكْرَامِ
english translation text: O Lord of Majesty and Honor!

arabic text: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولِهِ وَآلِهِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
english translation text: May Allah send blessings to Muhammad, His Messenger, and upon his Household the Infallible,

arabic text: وَسَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً كَثِيراً
english translation text: and may countless greetings be to them.
